prompt: The nightly settlement batch keeps freezing. Symptom: two workers each sitting on a transfer between the same pair of wallets forever — no exception, no timeout, CPU at zero, and the whole batch has to be kill -9'd. It's always a pair of customers paying each other back in the same run. One-directional traffic never hangs, and every transfer works fine in isolation, so the balance math itself seems right. Code is in wallet.py, repro is python3 test_wallet.py (it wedges/fails on current main). Fix it and show the test passing. test_wallet.py is off limits.
